notes: With recent Proton version I passed through menu and then the game stuck with HUD displayed only on black screen. Then I needed to restart my PC. With Proton 3.16-9 Beta It is playable out of box, but the performance is poor. It is pretty playable at "Fastest/Fast" graphics settings with 45-60 FPS. On "Good" settings I had only about 7-8 FPS. After no-ensyc launch parameter applied I had only 1 FPS and the game seems to be stuck (but it only reacts too slowly).
title: Triton Survival
